phrases.intent_en: Buy a one-way ticket to Cannes
phrases.text_local: Un billet aller simple pour Cannes, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: un bee-YAY ah-LAY SAM-pleh poor KAN seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Nice–Cannes train takes about 35 minutes along the coastal Marseille–Ventimiglia line — one of France's most scenic rail routes.

responses.english: At the ticket office, over there.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which platform the Monaco train departs from
phrases.text_local: De quel quai part le prochain train pour Monaco ?
phrases.pronunciation: deh kel KAY par leh pro-SHAN tran poor mo-nah-KO
phrases.cultural_note: Monaco is about 20 minutes east by regional TER train. Trains run very frequently during the day.

responses.english: Check the platform display. Platforms vary by schedule.
responses.french: Consultez l'affichage du quai. Les quais varient selon l'horaire.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to validate your ticket before boarding
phrases.text_local: Où dois-je composter mon billet avant de monter dans le train ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo DWAH-zheh kom-pos-TAY mon bee-YAY ah-VAN deh mon-TAY dan leh TRAN
phrases.cultural_note: In France you must stamp (composter) your ticket in the yellow machines before boarding or risk a fine.

responses.english: The validators are on the platform.
responses.phonetic: lay kohm-pos-TUR sohn soor luh KAY
responses.french: Les composteurs sont sur le quai.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the left-luggage lockers are
phrases.text_local: Où se trouvent les consignes à bagages, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo seh TROOV lay kon-SEEN-yeh ah bah-GAZH seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: Left-luggage facilities allow you to explore Nice hands-free before or after your train.

responses.english: There are lockers in the basement.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ah day kohn-SEE-nyuh oh soo-SOL
responses.french: Il y a des consignes au sous-sol.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the train to the airport stops at the station
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il une navette ferroviaire pour l'aéroport depuis cette gare ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL oon nah-VET feh-ro-VYEHR poor lay-ro-POR deh-PWEE SET GAR
phrases.cultural_note: Nice airport is reached by tram Line 2 from the city centre, not by train from Nice-Ville station.

responses.english: Yes, the tram goes to the airport.
responses.phonetic: wee luh TRAM vah ah lah-ay-roh-POR
responses.french: Oui, le tram va à l'aéroport.
